front_line: Latin America's dominant e-commerce and payments ecosystem serving 650 million people
thesis: MELI has built irreplaceable financial infrastructure with genuine network effects across underpenetrated markets. Trading at only 7x free cash flow despite generating $11.8B annually, it's capturing a multi-decade digital transformation while the market prices in modest expectations.
moat: Strong network effects and scale economies create genuine competitive barriers
risks: Four consecutive quarters of earnings misses suggest structural issues

drafts.x_post: MELI just announced $4.6B Mexico investment while trading at 7x FCF. Four straight earnings misses have the market worried, but this is the Amazon of Latin America during early digital transformation. Dead Simple Score: 92 (Gold) 🥇
video_talking_points: MercadoLibre runs Latin America's largest e-commerce and payments platform across 18 countries.
They're investing $4.6B in Mexico while generating $11.8B in free cash flow at just 7x valuation.
The company has genuine network effects and is becoming the financial backbone for 650 million underbanked Latin Americans.
Brazil represents 60% of revenue, creating dangerous single-point-of-failure risk in a volatile economy.
Despite four straight earnings misses, the dominant market position and reasonable valuation make this a buy.

image.query: automated e-commerce logistics hub, golden glowing parcels moving on sleek dark conveyors, abstract 3D render, macro detail
